CustomField.description: This hidden field is used for data loading and transferring data between instances. Only use it for mapping data during loading. [LOAD: No] [JUSTIFICATION: This field is deprecated] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: NA] [COMMENTS: Asana link https://app.asana.com/1/7934919496419/project/1150819886958569/task/1207126408685378?focus=true Reason - [Tech debt] Deprecate MR Comps component and associated data Version - v54]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This hidden field is used for data loading and transferring data between instances. Only use it for mapping data during loading.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2508 _External ID
